# routes-cli Improvement Plan — Ralph Executor

## Objective

Execute every improvement task defined in `IMPROVEMENT_PLAN.md`, one per iteration.
After each task: verify the build, commit, update `PROGRESS.md`. When all tasks are
done emit `<promise>LOOP_COMPLETE</promise>`.

---

## Pre-flight (every iteration)

1. Read `PROGRESS.md`. If it does not exist, create it now by copying the initial
   state from `specs/complete-improvement-plan/plan.md` Step 1, then re-read it.
2. Read `IMPROVEMENT... [truncated, 2983 chars total]
TASK-003 done: engines field, .nvmrc, .node-version, startup guard in index.ts. Also installed missing globals dep. Build passes.
TASK-010 done: enabled strictPropertyInitialization, noUnusedLocals, noUnusedParameters, noImplicitOverride, skipLibCheck=false. Fixed 4 unused-var errors. Build passes.
TASK-011 done: added RoutesCliError with ErrorCode enum and 6 static factories; isUserError flag drives friendly vs technical messages in error-handler. Build passes.

TASK-012 done: added zod schemas for addresses/keys/amounts, env.ts validates on load with RoutesCliError.configurationError, AddressNormalizer.normalize() validates with zod before processing. Build passes.

TASK-013 done: eliminated all any types - QuoteRequestPayload interface, cli-table3 ConstructorParameters typing, SVM types use Program/AnchorProvider/Transaction, all catch blocks use unknown with type narrowing. Build passes.

TASK-014 done: jest.config.ts with coverageThreshold, tests/ structure, pass-through mocks for viem/tronweb/solana, ora stub via moduleNameMapper. Fixed tests/tsconfig.json exclude inheritance, ESLint projectService:true. 38/38 tests pass, build passes.
TASK-015 done: ci.yml (quality job: lint, typecheck, test:coverage, build, audit) and security.yml (daily audit + TruffleHog secret scan) created. pnpm build passes.

TASK-016 done: ESLint strengthened with no-explicit-any/error, no-floating-promises/error, require-await/error, no-console/error, explicit-function-return-type/error. All 46 violations fixed. pnpm lint exits 0 (warnings only), pnpm build passes, 38/38 tests pass.

TASK-020 done: chain plugin registry extracted. ChainHandler interface + ChainRegistry singleton + EVM/TVM/SVM handlers. AddressNormalizer.normalize/denormalize delegate to registry. publish.ts validation uses chainRegistry.get().validateAddress(). pnpm build passes, 38/38 tests pass, lint 0 errors.

TASK-021 done: publish.ts god class decomposed. key-provider.ts + intent-prompts.ts + intent-service.ts + publisher-factory.ts extracted. publish.ts 650→115 lines. pnpm build passes, 38/38 tests pass, lint 0 errors.

TASK-022 done: BasePublisher contract strengthened. ValidationResult + abstract validate() + handleError/runSafely on base. All 3 publishers: override keyword + validate() impl + runSafely wrapping. pnpm build passes, 38/38 tests pass, lint 0 errors.

TASK-023 done: DI factories added to all 3 publishers. EVM public client lifecycle fixed (cached per instance, not re-created per call). Mock factories in tests/__mocks__/. pnpm build passes, 38/38 tests pass, lint 0 errors.

TASK-024 done: SVM module reorganized. pda-manager.ts, solana-client.ts, transaction-builder.ts created. svm-transaction.ts deleted. svm-publisher.ts now imports exactly 4 local modules. 38/38 tests pass, pnpm build passes.

TASK-025 done: ConfigService created in src/config/config-service.ts. updatePortalAddresses logic moved inside fromEnvironment(). Global mutation removed from index.ts. 38/38 tests pass, pnpm build passes.
TASK-026 done: TVM token loop fixed (all tokens approved), SVM proverAddress added to publish signature and PublishContext, TVM key cleared in finally block. 38/38 tests pass, build passes.

TASK-030 done: 18 AddressNormalizer tests covering EVM/TVM/SVM normalize+denormalize round-trips, invalid address throws (RoutesCliError.INVALID_ADDRESS), unsupported chain throws (RoutesCliError.UNSUPPORTED_CHAIN), hex TVM format, zero-address edge case. 42/42 tests pass, build passes.

TASK-031 done: 4 new tests added to chain-detector (getNetworkFromChainConfig MAINNET/DEVNET/throws, isValidAddressForChain unknown type). Used jest.spyOn to mock getChainById for devnet branch since CHAIN_CONFIGS filters to production at module load. 46/46 tests pass, build passes.

TASK-032 done: 53 tests added for IntentConverter (18 tests) and PortalEncoder (35 tests). EVM/SVM encode-decode round-trips, isRoute() type guard, empty arrays, large BigInts. 99/99 pass, build passes.
TASK-033 done: 4 tests added to quote.test.ts (non-200 error, missing quoteResponses field, QUOTES_API_URL branch). 103/103 pass, build passes.
TASK-034 done: 40 config integration tests added (chains.test.ts + tokens.test.ts). 143/143 pass, build passes.
TASK-035 done: 8 EVMPublisher integration tests added. 151/151 pass, build passes.
TASK-036 done: 12 integration tests for intent publishing flow. 163/163 pass, build passes.
TASK-037 done: E2E test infrastructure for EVM publish on Anvil fork of Base mainnet. 163/163 pass, build passes. Commit: e44d82a
TASK-040 done: ARCHITECTURE.md created (510 lines, 7 sections). Build passes. Commit: 9751186
TASK-041 done: CONTRIBUTING.md created (222 lines, 6 sections). Build passes. Commit: 1b96ca6
TASK-042 done: SECURITY.md created (204 lines, 5 sections). Build passes. Commit: 421a85c
TASK-043 done: JSDoc added to 7 files (ChainConfig, TokenConfig, EnvConfig, createPublishCommand, all 3 publishers). Build passes. 163/163 tests pass. Commit: c4a0705

TASK-044 done: .env.example rewritten with format docs for all 3 key types + all 11 chains. Portal address map expanded. QUOTES_PREPROD/QUOTES_API_URL added to zod schema. Build passes. 163/163 tests pass. Commit: b8750d2

TASK-045 done: added help text with ≥3 examples to publish/status/config commands, enriched error messages (invalidPrivateKey/invalidAddress/insufficientBalance/unsupportedChain with format hints + fix instructions), updated --private-key description. 163/163 tests pass. Commit: 4cb01b3

TASK-046 done: installed @changesets/cli, ran init, created CHANGELOG.md (1.0.0 entry), added release job to ci.yml (tag push trigger + npm publish + GitHub Release), documented release process in CONTRIBUTING.md §7. Build passes. Commit: c633da7

TASK-050 done: created KeyHandle class in src/core/security/, updated all publishers to accept KeyHandle instead of raw string, updated getPrivateKey() to return KeyHandle, zeroizes buffer after use(). 163/163 tests pass. Build passes. Commit: 453ad9a

TASK-051 done: created withFallback<T>() in src/core/rpc/rpc-provider.ts (3 attempts + exponential backoff), added TVM_RPC_URL_2/SVM_RPC_URL_2 env vars + tvmFallbackRpcUrl/svmFallbackRpcUrl to EnvConfig. 163/163 tests pass. Commit: 2771d8e
TASK-052 done: installed typedoc, typedoc.json, pnpm docs script, docs/api/ gitignored, GitHub Pages job in ci.yml. Build passes. Commit: 6de90e7
TASK-053 done: ChainRegistry.isRegistered, BasePublisher.runPreflightChecks, all 3 publishers validated, unsupportedChain error before RPC. 163/163 tests pass. Build passes.
All 32 automated tasks complete. TASK-001 requires manual human action (git history audit + key rotation). Final report written to PROGRESS.md.

## Reason
max_runtime

## Status
Stopped at runtime limit.

## Summary
- Iterations: 35
- Duration: 4h 0m 52s
- Exit code: 2
